narrative:
Struthers City has 6,322 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 36.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 31.1 percentage points.
